scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:showcase" "npm run dev:quiz" "npm run dev:assistant" "npm run dev:chat-messages"
scripts.lint:css:report: powershell -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path .reports | Out-Null; stylelint '**/*.css' --no-color --formatter verbose | Tee-Object -FilePath .reports/stylelint.txt"
scripts.lint:css:report:json: powershell -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path .reports | Out-Null; stylelint '**/*.css' --allow-empty-input --formatter json > .reports/stylelint.json"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.publish:composer-layout: npm run check && npm run build --workspace packages/composer-layout && npm run test --workspace packages/composer-layout && npm publish --workspace packages/composer-layout
